mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET hero_name = #{heroName}, content = #{content}, one_line_comment = #{oneLineComment}, rating = #{rating}, is_public = #{isPublic}, pred_score_home = #{predScoreHome}, pred_score_away = #{predScoreAway}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.nickname, SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home IS NOT NULL AND d.pred_score_away IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalGames, SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home = g.score_home AND d.pred_score_away = g.score_away THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS winGames, (SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home = g.score_home AND d.pred_score_away = g.score_away THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home IS NOT NULL AND d.pred_score_away IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100 AS winRate FROM diaries d JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id WHERE d.is_verified = 1 AND g.status = 'FINISHED' AND d.status != 'INVALID' GROUP BY d.member_id HAVING totalGames >= 5 ORDER BY winGames DESC, winRate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT d.diary_id, d.game_id, d.image_url, d.one_line_comment, g.game_date, g.game_type, g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code, g.score_home, g.score_away, d.pred_score_home AS predScoreHome, d.pred_score_away AS predScoreAway, g.status AS gameStatus, g.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, t1.short_name AS homeTeamName, t2.short_name AS awayTeamName, IFNULL(s.short_name, s.name) AS stadiumName,
CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code = g.home_team_code AND g.score_home > g.score_away THEN 'WIN' WHEN d.snapshot_team_code = g.home_team_code AND g.score_home < g.score_away THEN 'LOSE' WHEN d.snapshot_team_code = g.away_team_code AND g.score_away > g.score_home THEN 'WIN' WHEN d.snapshot_team_code = g.away_team_code AND g.score_away < g.score_home THEN 'LOSE' WHEN g.score_home = g.score_away THEN 'DRAW' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult FROM diaries d JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code LEFT JOIN stadiums s ON g.stadium_id = s.stadium_id WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY g.game_date DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diaries (member_id, game_id, snapshot_team_code, pred_score_home, pred_score_away, pred_hero, hero_name, content, one_line_comment, rating, image_url, is_verified, verified_at, status, is_public, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{gameId}, #{snapshotTeamCode}, #{predScoreHome}, #{predScoreAway}, #{predHero}, #{heroName}, #{content}, #{oneLineComment}, #{rating}, #{imageUrl}, #{isVerified}, #{verifiedAt}, 'COMPLETED', IFNULL(#{isPublic}, 'PUBLIC'), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, m.nickname, m.email as memberEmail, m.profile_image, g.game_date, g.game_time, IFNULL(s.short_name, s.name) AS stadiumName, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, t1.logo_image_url AS homeTeamLogo, t2.logo_image_url AS awayTeamLogo, g.home_starter, g.away_starter, g.score_home, g.score_away, g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code, g.cancel_reason FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN stadiums s ON g.stadium_id = s.stadium_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code WHERE d.diary_id = #{diaryId}

SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.image_url, d.one_line_comment, d.rating, d.game_id, g.game_date, g.game_time, g.game_type, g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code, g.score_home, g.score_away, g.status AS gameStatus, g.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, IFNULL(s.short_name, s.name) AS stadiumName,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code LEFT JOIN stadiums s ON g.stadium_id = s.stadium_id WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY g.game_date DESC, g.game_time DESC

SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.image_url, d.one_line_comment, d.rating, g.game_date, g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code, g.score_home, g.score_away, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.my_team_code AS snapshotTeamCode, t1.logo_image_url AS homeTeamLogo, t2.logo_image_url AS awayTeamLogo,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = m.my_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN follows f ON d.member_id = f.following_id JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code WHERE f.follower_id = #{memberId} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_public IN ('PUBLIC', 'FRIENDS') ORDER BY g.game_date DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT DISTINCT g.stadium_id FROM diaries d JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_verified = 1

SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.one_line_comment, d.rating, d.content, d.image_url, g.game_date, g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code, g.score_home, g.score_away, g.status AS gameStatus, g.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.my_team_code AS snapshotTeamCode, t1.logo_image_url AS homeTeamLogo, t2.logo_image_url AS awayTeamLogo,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code WHERE d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_public IN ('PUBLIC', 'FRIENDS') AND d.member_id IN ( SELECT following_id FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{memberId} UNION SELECT follower_id FROM follows WHERE following_id = #{memberId} ) ORDER BY g.game_date DESC, d.created_at DESC

SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.one_line_comment, d.rating, d.content, d.image_url, g.game_date, g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code, g.score_home, g.score_away, g.status AS gameStatus, g.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.my_team_code AS snapshotTeamCode,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = m.my_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN follows f ON d.member_id = f.following_id JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code WHERE f.follower_id = #{memberId} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_public IN ('PUBLIC', 'FRIENDS') ORDER BY g.game_date DESC, d.created_at DESC

SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.one_line_comment, d.rating, d.content, d.image_url, g.game_date, g.status AS gameStatus, g.cancel_reason, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, m.nickname, m.profile_image, g.score_home, g.score_away,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN follows f ON d.member_id = f.follower_id JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code WHERE f.following_id = #{memberId} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_public IN ('PUBLIC', 'FRIENDS') ORDER BY g.game_date DESC, d.created_at DESC

SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.one_line_comment, d.rating, d.content, d.image_url, g.game_date, g.status AS gameStatus, g.cancel_reason, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, m.nickname, m.profile_image, g.score_home, g.score_away,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code WHERE d.member_id = #{targetMemberId} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_public IN ('PUBLIC', 'FRIENDS') ORDER BY g.game_date DESC, d.created_at DESC

SELECT d.diary_id, d.member_id, d.one_line_comment, d.rating, d.content, d.image_url, g.game_date, g.status AS gameStatus, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, m.nickname, m.profile_image, g.score_home, g.score_away,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code WHERE d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_public = 'PUBLIC' ORDER BY d.created_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT d.*, g.game_date, g.game_time, g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code, g.score_home, g.score_away, t1.name_kr AS homeTeamName, t2.name_kr AS awayTeamName, IFNULL(s.short_name, s.name) AS stadiumName, m.nickname, m.profile_image,
CASE WHEN g.winning_team = d.snapshot_team_code THEN 'WIN' WHEN g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 'DRAW' WHEN g.winning_team IS NOT NULL THEN 'LOSE' ELSE 'NONE' END AS gameResult
FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t1 ON g.home_team_code = t1.team_code LEFT JOIN teams t2 ON g.away_team_code = t2.team_code LEFT JOIN stadiums s ON g.stadium_id = s.stadium_id WHERE d.share_uuid = #{uuid} AND d.status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diaries WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diaries WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
